channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: 4 elite headphones I tried at High End Vienna — including a pair with Wi-Fi and Meze's most expensive set ever
item.description: Of all the amazing headphones I tried at High End Vienna, these 4 really stood out.

item.title: Quote of the day by Nvidia CEO, Jensen Huang: "I appreciate that many of us grew up and enjoyed science fiction, but it's not helpful" — on quantifying the existential risks posed by AI
item.description: With prominent scientists and technologists frequently warning of the risks of AI, Jensen Huang eases concerns by lamenting the influence of sci-fi

item.title: US states are reportedly planning to sue to block Paramount's Warner Bros. takeover
item.description: California's attorney general Rob Bonta launched a probe into the deal shortly after it was announced.

item.title: Argentina vs Honduras free streams: How to watch World Cup warm-up from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Argentina vs Honduras live streams online and from anywhere in one of the last friendlies before the 2026 World Cup gets underway.

item.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
item.description: Even with Lockdown Mode, ChatGPT could be still vulnerable to prompt injections, but the goal is to reduce the likelihood that sensitive data gets shared in the process.
